title: Fix 5 critical security blockers for mainnet deployment

requirements.text: Implement stable storage for all backend state maps (userProfiles, trades, licenses, botProfiles, auditLog, analyticsEvents, usedNonces, subscriptionTiers, botIdIndex) using either stable type declarations or Pre/Post-Upgrade hooks with serialization to prevent data loss during canister upgrades

quotes: Alle Maps (userProfiles, trades, licenses, botProfiles, auditLog, analyticsEvents, usedNonces, subscriptionTiers, botIdIndex) sind nicht stable. Ein Canister-Upgrade löscht ALLE Daten.

acceptanceCriteria: All state maps are declared as stable or serialized in preupgrade/postupgrade hooks
Canister upgrades preserve all existing data without loss
State recovery is tested after upgrade simulation

requirements.text: Implement full Ed25519 signature verification in verifyBotSignature() function (line 287 in main.mo) to cryptographically validate bot signatures using the registered public keys from botProfiles, not just checking nonce freshness and timestamp windows

quotes: verifyBotSignature() in main.mo (Zeile 287) prüft nur Nonce-Freshness und Timestamp-Window, verifiziert aber nie die eigentliche Signatur. Jeder der einen gültigen Nonce+Timestamp sendet kann Trades submitten.

acceptanceCriteria: verifyBotSignature() performs cryptographic Ed25519 signature verification against registered public key
Invalid signatures are rejected even with valid nonce and timestamp
Only requests with valid Ed25519 signatures from registered bots can submit trades

requirements.text: Implement full Ed25519 signature verification in check_uplink() function (line 706 in main.mo), replacing the TODO comment and empty signature size check with actual cryptographic verification logic

quotes: Ebenso check_uplink() (Zeile 706): // TODO Phase 2: Implement full Ed25519 signature verification — Signature-Blob wird nur auf size() > 0 geprüft.

acceptanceCriteria: check_uplink() performs full Ed25519 signature verification
TODO comment is removed and replaced with working verification code
Uplink status changes require valid cryptographic signatures

requirements.text: Encrypt the Stripe secret key in stripeConfig (line 950) instead of storing it as plaintext in StripeConfiguration, using encryption or delegating to an external secret manager via HTTP outcall to prevent exposure during memory dumps or controller access

quotes: stripeConfig (Zeile 950) speichert den Stripe secretKey als Klartext in StripeConfiguration. Bei einem Memory-Dump oder Controller-Zugriff ist der Key exposed.

acceptanceCriteria: Stripe secret key is encrypted before storage in canister memory
Secret key cannot be retrieved in plaintext from memory dumps
Decryption mechanism works correctly for Stripe API calls

requirements.text: Change Stripe checkout session creation from mode=payment (line 97 in stripe.mo) to mode=subscription with Stripe price_id configuration to support recurring subscription tiers (Free/Diamond Hand/Whale) instead of one-time payments

quotes: stripe.mo Zeile 97 setzt mode=payment (Einmalzahlung). Die Subscription-Tiers (Free/Diamond Hand/Whale) suggerieren aber wiederkehrende Abos.

acceptanceCriteria: Stripe checkout sessions use mode=subscription instead of mode=payment
Subscription tiers reference Stripe price_id instead of inline price_data
Checkout flow creates recurring subscriptions not one-time payments

requirements.text: Implement Stripe webhooks to handle invoice.paid and customer.subscription.deleted events for subscription lifecycle management, ensuring subscription status updates are processed correctly

quotes: mode=subscription mit Stripe price_id statt inline price_data verwenden. Webhook für invoice.paid/customer.subscription.deleted implementieren.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint handles Stripe webhook events
invoice.paid events activate or renew user subscriptions
customer.subscription.deleted events deactivate user subscriptions
Webhook signature verification is implemented

requirements.text: Replace the unsafe Ed25519 key generation fallback in ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx (lines 58-67) with tweetnacl or noble-ed25519 library to generate cryptographically valid key pairs, or block the fallback path with a clear error message if Web Crypto Ed25519 is unavailable

quotes: ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx Zeile 58-67: Wenn Web Crypto Ed25519 nicht verfügbar ist, werden zwei unabhängige Random-Arrays als 'Private Key' und 'Public Key' generiert. Der Public Key hat keine kryptographische Beziehung zum Private Key — die Signatur-Chain ist gebrochen.

acceptanceCriteria: tweetnacl or noble-ed25519 library is used as fallback for Ed25519 key generation
Generated public keys have correct cryptographic relationship to private keys
If no Ed25519 support is available, user sees clear error message blocking wizard progression

requirements.text: Implement a cleanup timer for the usedNonces map in the backend to prevent unbounded growth by removing expired nonces older than the timestamp window

quotes: usedNonces Map wächst unbegrenzt — braucht Cleanup-Timer

acceptanceCriteria: Periodic timer removes expired nonces from usedNonces map
Map size does not grow indefinitely over time
Cleanup only removes nonces outside the valid timestamp window

requirements.text: Remove the duplicate function between saveCallerUserProfile() and update_profile() in the backend, keeping only one implementation to eliminate code duplication

quotes: saveCallerUserProfile() und update_profile() sind identisch — eine löschen

acceptanceCriteria: Only one profile update function exists in the backend
All callers reference the single implementation
No functional regressions in profile update operations

requirements.text: Replace the assert statement in storeAnalyticsEvent filter (line 1129) with an if/return pattern to prevent canister traps, allowing graceful error handling instead of stopping the canister

quotes: assert in storeAnalyticsEvent Filter (Zeile 1129) — kann den Canister trappen statt zu filtern, assert durch if/return ersetzen

acceptanceCriteria: assert statement is replaced with if condition and early return
Invalid analytics events are filtered without trapping the canister
Analytics event storage continues to function correctly

requirements.text: Implement actual storage logic in storeJwt() and storeStrategicVault() functions instead of returning the input unchanged, ensuring these functions persist data correctly

quotes: storeJwt() und storeStrategicVault() speichern nichts — geben nur Input zurück

acceptanceCriteria: storeJwt() persists JWT data to backend storage
storeStrategicVault() persists vault configuration to backend storage
Stored data can be retrieved in subsequent calls

requirements.text: Fix getHeartbeatData() to use the accountId parameter instead of ignoring it and using the caller principal, ensuring heartbeat data is fetched for the requested account

quotes: getHeartbeatData ignoriert den accountId Parameter — nutzt caller statt accountId

acceptanceCriteria: getHeartbeatData() uses the accountId parameter to fetch data
Heartbeat data is returned for the specified accountId, not the caller
Function behavior matches its parameter signature

requirements.text: Remove unused 3D dependencies (@react-three/fiber, three, @react-three/cannon) from package.json to reduce bundle size by approximately 500KB, as they are not used in the application
acceptanceCriteria: 3D dependencies are removed from package.json
Application builds successfully without these dependencies
Bundle size is reduced by approximately 500KB

requirements.text: Resolve the build tool inconsistency where package.json references dfx generate but icp.yaml uses the icp CLI, ensuring build configuration is consistent and uses the correct tool

quotes: package.json referenziert dfx generate aber icp.yaml nutzt icp CLI — Build-Tool-Inkonsistenz

acceptanceCriteria: Build configuration consistently uses either dfx or icp CLI, not both
package.json scripts align with icp.yaml configuration
Build process executes without tool conflicts

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
Preserve existing Railway Python bot integration endpoint: https://smv-production.up.railway.app/api/v1/signals
Ensure all changes are backwards compatible with existing user data
Do not break existing subscription tier structure (Free/Diamond Hand/Whale)
nonGoals: Adding new subscription tiers beyond existing Free/Diamond Hand/Whale
Modifying the Cupertino Quant design system colors or typography
Changing the Internet Identity authentication flow
